hooks.prompt: The user is about to use Edit/Write. Review the conversation context: Is an orchestrator agent currently active or has one been recently invoked? If yes, respond with JSON containing: {"systemMessage": "⚠️  REMINDER: Orchestrator agents are active — spawn worker agents to implement changes instead of editing directly. Let workers handle Edit/Write/Bash tools.", "continue": true}. If no orchestrator context, respond with {"continue": true}.
